meaning: adj.超过正常的,超过正常范围的
examples: We have been looking at the shadowy world of the paranormal.
Science may be able to provide some explanations of paranormal phenomena.
Although the mysteries of the Aztec, Mayan, and Inca civilizations have been known for centuries, now the public is also becoming aware of unusual, paranormal phenomena in countries such as Peru.
Based on the success of Paranormal, Paramount set up a division to produce micro-budget films.
The first Paranormal Activity movie was the kind of hit Hollywood executives dream about.
